description: SlimZero v1 - Zero-overhead prompt compression, response minimisation, hallucination guarding, and autonomous agent orchestration

userStories.title: Create SlimZero package structure and exception hierarchy
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a well-organized package structure with proper exception handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/ package with __init__.py

Create slimzero/exceptions.py with SlimZeroError base class and all subclasses (SlimZeroInputError, SlimZeroRewriteError, SlimZeroSemanticRejection, SlimZeroBudgetWarning, SlimZeroResponseWarning, SlimZeroHallucinationFlag, SlimZeroAgentError)
Create slimzero/schemas.py with IntentSchema, StageInput, StageOutput, SlimZeroResult dataclasses
Create pyproject.toml with package metadata and dependencies
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed: Package structure, exception hierarchy, schemas, pyproject.toml. All 22 tests pass. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Implement Intent Extractor stage (Stage 1)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to parse user prompts to extract structured intent for downstream processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/intent.py with IntentExtractor class using spaCy
Extract core_task, entities, output_format, and constraints from raw prompt
Output IntentSchema dataclass that is serializable and hashable
Handle spaCy unavailable case gracefully (use raw text as core_task)
Add spaCy to pyproject.toml dependencies
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: IntentExtractor with spaCy integration, output format detection, filler phrase removal, graceful fallback. All 29 tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Semantic Guard stage (Stage 3)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a safety mechanism to ensure rewritten prompts preserve meaning.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/semantic_guard.py with SemanticGuard class using sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
Compute cosine similarity between original and rewritten prompts
Default threshold 0.92, configurable via sim_threshold config
Accept rewrite if similarity >= threshold, reject if below
Enforce minimum threshold of 0.80 (non-bypassable rule)
Add sentence-transformers to pyproject.toml dependencies
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: SemanticGuard with cosine similarity, configurable threshold (0.80-1.0), fallback mode. All 19 tests pass. Total 70 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Prompt Rewriter stage (Stage 2)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to compress prompts into minimal imperative form while preserving meaning.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/rewriter.py with PromptRewriter class using T5-small
Apply rewriting strategies: strip filler phrases, merge duplicate sentences, convert hedged to imperative
Hard constraint: rewritten prompt must be <= 85% of original token count
Fall back to Ollama (qwen3 1.7B) if T5 unavailable
Never write directly to API payload - Semantic Guard validates first
Add transformers to pyproject.toml dependencies
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: PromptRewriter with T5-small, rule-based fallback, Ollama fallback support. 29 tests pass. Total 99 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Few-Shot Ranker stage (Stage 4)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to retain only the most relevant few-shot examples to reduce token overhead.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/few_shot.py with FewShotRanker class
Detect few-shot blocks via pattern matching (Q:/A:, numbered, XML-tagged)
Rank examples by cosine similarity to current query using MiniLM
Retain top-k examples (default k=3, configurable)
Preserve at least 1 example if any present
Skip if fewer than 2 examples detected
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: FewShotRanker with Q:/A:, XML-tagged pattern detection, cosine similarity ranking via MiniLM, keyword fallback. 28 tests pass. Total 98 tests.

userStories.title: Implement History Compressor stage (Stage 5)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to compress conversation history to manage context window efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/history.py with HistoryCompressor class
Keep last N turns verbatim (default N=4, configurable, min 2)
Summarize older turns with T5-small into 'Prior context:' block
Cache summaries and regenerate only when turn count threshold crossed
Summary token budget: max 20% of total prompt budget
Fallback to truncation if summarization fails or produces longer output
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: HistoryCompressor with T5 summarization, window-based retention, caching, truncation fallback. 27 tests pass. Total 125 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Response Format Injector stage (Stage 6)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to precondition the LLM to respond minimally without preamble or padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/injector.py with ResponseFormatInjector class
Append instruction fragment to system prompt based on output_format from Intent Extractor
Fragments library: general, code, list, explain (each <= 12 tokens)
Append (not prepend) to avoid displacing developer's system prompt
Create default system prompt if none exists
Skip injection if developer's prompt already contains response-length instructions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: ResponseFormatInjector with fragment library for all formats, skips existing instructions, appends not prepends. 31 tests pass. Total 156 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Hallucination Risk Scorer stage (Stage 7)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to classify query hallucination risk and inject uncertainty instructions for high-risk queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/hallucination.py with HallucinationRiskScorer class
Implement 50-rule heuristic classifier (regex + keyword patterns, no model inference)
Classify as HIGH: specific dates, numbers, citations, 'latest'/'current' facts -> inject uncertainty instruction
Classify as MEDIUM: named entities with verifiable attributes -> inject verification instruction
Classify as LOW: creative, open-ended, opinion queries -> no action
Default to MEDIUM on classifier errors
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: HallucinationRiskScorer with 50-rule heuristic classifier, date/number/citation/recency patterns, uncertainty instructions. 32 tests pass. Total 188 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Token Budget Enforcer stage (Stage 8)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to enforce a hard token ceiling on prompts with priority-based trimming.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/stages/budget.py with TokenBudgetEnforcer class using tiktoken
Support cl100k_base, o200k_base, and claude tokeniser approximations
Trim priority (first to last): injected fragments, old history summary, low-ranked examples beyond top-1, compressed rewrite
Never trim: core task, most recent 2 turns, critical entities
Proceed over budget with warning if core task would be trimmed
Add tiktoken to pyproject.toml dependencies
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: TokenBudgetEnforcer with tiktoken support, priority-based trimming, word-based fallback. 28 tests pass. Total 216 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Response Validator (post-processing)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to validate that LLM responses actually address the parsed intent.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/post/validator.py with ResponseValidator class
Embed IntentSchema.core_task and first 512 tokens of response using MiniLM
Compute cosine similarity, threshold 0.60 (responses allowed creative form)
Flag response with SlimZeroWarning.OFF_TASK if below threshold
Response always returned to user - never suppressed
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Completed: ResponseValidator with cosine similarity via MiniLM, keyword fallback, 0.60 threshold. 22 tests pass. Total 238 tests.

userStories.title: Implement Hallucination Flag (post-processing)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect confident assertions in responses that correspond to high-risk query types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/post/flagger.py with HallucinationFlagger class
Implement 80-pattern heuristic library for date assertions, numeric specifics, citation phrases, authority claims
Highlight matches in response metadata with character offsets
No second API call - purely local signal
False positives acceptable - SlimZero errs toward flagging
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement Savings Logger with JSON export
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track per-call and cumulative statistics for token savings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/post/logger.py with SavingsLogger class

Track: original_input_tokens, sent_input_tokens, delta_input, estimated_output_tokens, stages_applied, semantic_similarity, hallucination_risk_tier, response_validated, flags_raised, cumulative_tokens_saved, cumulative_estimated_cost_usd
Exportable: JSON per session, Markdown summary
Log every call with structured JSON including timestamp, stage, context
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement SlimZero core pipeline runner
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a unified pipeline that runs all stages in order and returns the optimized result.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/core.py with SlimZero class and run_pipeline method

Pipeline order: Intent Extractor -> Prompt Rewriter -> Semantic Guard -> Few-Shot Ranker -> History Compressor -> Response Format Injector -> Hallucination Risk Scorer -> Token Budget Enforcer -> LLM Call -> Response Validator -> Hallucination Flag -> Savings Logger
Graceful degradation: original prompt sent if all stages fail
Apply all fault prevention rules per PRD section 9.3
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement GSD task graph with networkx
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a task decomposition layer that breaks goals into checkpointed sub-tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/agent/gsd.py with GSDTaskGraph class using networkx DiGraph
Each node: task_id, description, status, dependencies, retry_count, output
Task runs only when all dependencies complete
LLM call (compressed) for initial decomposition only
Validate decomposition: valid JSON, no circular dependencies
Checkpoint: serialize to JSON after every status change
Resume from first pending node on restart
Add networkx to pyproject.toml dependencies
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement Ralph agent loop integration with circuit breakers
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Ralph autonomous agent loop with SlimZero enhancements for fault prevention.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/agent/ralph.py with RalphLoop class
Implement circuit breaker: max_steps (default 20), max_retries_per_step (default 3), max_total_tokens (configurable)
Semantic drift detector: compare plan embedding to goal embedding, inject re-grounding if similarity < 0.75 for 3 consecutive steps
Tool-call validator: check required arguments present, types correct, known tool name before execution
Action auditor: log every tool call with timestamp, tool_name, arguments, result_summary, tokens_used
Checkpoint state before HumanEscalation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement drop-in API with three-line integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the simplest possible integration: three lines of code to use SlimZero.
acceptanceCriteria: from slimzero import SlimZero
sz = SlimZero(model='claude-sonnet-4-6')
response = sz.call(prompt='...')
SlimZero wraps existing API client transparently
Support api_client parameter for passing existing Anthropic/OpenAI client

Support all config parameters: token_budget, sim_threshold, few_shot_k, history_window, modules, hallucination_guard, response_validation, agent_mode, max_agent_steps, max_retries, drift_threshold, dashboard, log_file
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement plugin API with BaseStage interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extend SlimZero with custom pipeline stages via the plugin API.
acceptanceCriteria: Create slimzero/plugins/__init__.py with BaseStage, StageInput, StageOutput classes
Plugin contract: must not raise exceptions that halt pipeline, must not make external API calls
Plugins that modify prompts must set modified=True so semantic guard re-runs
Auto-discovery via Python entry points (slimzero.stages group)
Manual registration via extra_stages parameter
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Create PyPI package and examples
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pip-installable package with examples for quick adoption.
acceptanceCriteria: Update pyproject.toml with proper package metadata (name, version, description, author, license)
Configure pip extras: slimzero[agent], slimzero[dashboard], slimzero[all]
Create examples/ directory with integration examples for Flask, FastAPI, LangChain, bare API
Create slimzero/__main__.py for CLI entry point
Create docs/ with MkDocs configuration
Typecheck passes
